description: User scrolls down the Explore page to view more task cards, moving past the 'Short tasks' section.
frame_description: The screen scrolls downwards, revealing more session cards like 'In Person' and 'Diary Study'.

description: User continues scrolling down the Explore page, bringing the 'AI Interview' card into view at the bottom.
frame_description: The list of cards moves upwards as the user scrolls further down.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the Explore page, returning to the 'Short tasks' section.
frame_description: The screen scrolls upwards, returning to the initial view of the Explore page.
